# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
  namespace: service-mesh-policies
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: default-authorization-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-policy-framework
    policy.linkerd.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default authorization policy for namespace-level service-to-service communication"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: ""
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-allow-authenticated
  namespace: service-mesh-policies
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: default-allow-authenticated
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-policy-framework
    policy.linkerd.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Allow authenticated meshed traffic by default for services without explicit authorization rules"
spec:
  server:
    name: default-authorization-policy
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*.service-mesh-policies.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-deny-unauthenticated
  namespace: service-mesh-policies
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: default-deny-unauthenticated
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-policy-framework
    policy.linkerd.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Deny unauthenticated traffic to services by default"
spec:
  server:
    name: default-authorization-policy
  client:
    unauthenticated: false
    meshTLS:
      identities: []
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: namespace-default-policy
  namespace: service-mesh-policies
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: namespace-default-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-policy-framework
    policy.linkerd.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default authorization policy for all services in namespace without explicit rules"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-authorization-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity-authentication
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-identity-authentication
  namespace: service-mesh-policies
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: mesh-identity-authentication
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-policy-framework
    policy.linkerd.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Authenticate service-to-service communication using mesh TLS identities"
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.service-mesh-policies.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: "*"
      namespace: service-mesh-policies
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-network-authentication
  namespace: service-mesh-policies
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: default-network-authentication
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-policy-framework
    policy.linkerd.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Network-level authentication for internal cluster communication"
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: health-check-policy
  namespace: service-mesh-policies
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: health-check-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-policy-framework
    policy.linkerd.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Allow health check probes from kubelet for services without explicit authorization"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-authorization-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: default-network-authentication
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
